page_title: List of requests (Attack on Titan Game)
text:
Requests are unlocked Attack on Titan once the player has completed Chapter 3 of the main game and seen the first set of credits roll. After that, Requests will be available in base and appear on the mini-map as yellow exclamation marks.

General Information

Each Request comes in a series of three that must be completed in order to unlock an optional cut scene. Cut scenes can refer events that had not yet been covered in the anime at the time of the game's release, or events that had only been alluded to, though major spoilers are avoided. Completing Requests gradually unlocks additional Requests.

Some Requests can only be accepted by a certain group of characters, so if no characters are currently offering Requests, but Requests should be available, it is best to switch to a character from a different social group. Characters cannot accept Requests from themselves.

If characters have more than one Request series, the lower tier must be completed before the higher tier unlocks.
